title: avena sativa var. brevis
intro: Avena sativa var. brevis, also known as the oat grass or oat straw, is a type of grass that belongs to the Avena sativa species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Avena sativa var. brevis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Avena sativa var. brevis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
